title: aster ciliolatus var. comatus
intro: Aster ciliolatus var. comatus, commonly known as the hairy mountain aster or hairy white panicle aster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster ciliolatus var. comatus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying the flowers and leaves to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
